name: Dean's Auto Bus & Truck
registry_source: Dun & Bradstreet (dandb.com) business directory listing for Dean's Auto Bus And Truck Inc, 414 E Sauk Trl, Chicago Heights, IL 60411
notes: No FMCSA/SAFER carrier record found under 'Dean's Auto Bus', 'Deans Auto', or 'Dean Transportation' matching South Chicago Heights IL (only Lansing MI Dean Transportation Inc USDOT 1538328, which is a different entity). D&B reports founding year 2008, NAICS classification 'Local Trucking, Without Storage', 1 employee, ~$71K annual revenue — suggests a very small operation that may not require interstate USDOT registration. Illinois SOS business entity search (apps.ilsos.gov) requires interactive form submission and returned 403 to direct URL probes; could not retrieve official IL corporate filing data. Company likely operates as intrastate-only carrier, exempt from federal USDOT registration.

name: D-N Ca Inc Which Will Do BUS
notes: NOT A BUS/TRANSPORTATION OPERATOR. Name string 'D-N Ca Inc Which Will Do BUS' is mis-OCR'd / truncated from the standard Illinois foreign-corporation filing phrase: '<EntityName>, which will do business in Illinois as <AlternateName>'. 'BUS' = 'BUSINESS' truncated. Address 2 N Riverside Plaza Suite 600, Chicago IL 60606 is a commercial office tower commonly used as a registered-agent / virtual office address (e.g., for CT Corporation and similar agents) — not an operating bus yard. No SAFER record matches 'D-N CA' or any variant. Source list (FMCSA top-N power units) likely scraped this from an IL SOS foreign-entity name field and misclassified it as a transportation company. RECOMMEND REMOVING FROM TUCK-IN TARGET LIST.

name: Howellcorp Which Will Do Bus
registry_source: Dun & Bradstreet, Crunchbase, PRNewswire 2013-01 launch of LifeCounts financial management platform
notes: NOT A BUS/TRANSPORTATION OPERATOR. 'Which Will Do Bus' = 'Which Will Do Business' truncated/OCR error. HowellCorp is a Seattle-based financial technology company founded by Nicholas Howell that operated LifeCounts, an online personal financial management platform (launched January 2013). D&B classifies under Medical Equipment / surgical instruments (possibly stale or erroneous classification). Address 100 S King St #100 PMB 701 is a Private MailBox at a CMRA-style address in Pioneer Square — not a transportation yard. No SAFER carrier record under 'HOWELLCORP'. RECOMMEND REMOVING FROM TUCK-IN TARGET LIST.

name: Travelers Transit
carrier_operation: Interstate, Private (Passenger) — also carries Passengers per cargo classification
fmcsa_status: ACTIVE (operating authority status NOT AUTHORIZED for for-hire interstate; classified as Private carrier)
inc_date: 2004-09-27 (RI foreign-corp registration); originally organized under Massachusetts law (MA incorporation date not retrieved, but PrivCo/D&B indicate company established 1998)
officers: President & Treasurer: Kathleen Legare (106 Grove St, Millville, MA 01529); Secretary & Vice President: Marjorie E. Blanchette (112 Grove St, Millville, MA 01529); RI Registered Agent: William R. Legare (664 Front St, Woonsocket, RI 02895)
entity_status: Active — qualified Foreign Corporation in Rhode Island (RI Dept of State ID 000143091); domicile Massachusetts
registry_source: Rhode Island Secretary of State / Department of State Business Portal (business.sos.ri.gov) entity ID 000143091; FMCSA SAFER snapshot USDOT 1864129
notes: Confident match — physical address 664 Front St Woonsocket RI 02895 in SAFER snapshot exactly matches input address. MCS-150 filed 2026-04-17 with 100,000 miles reported for 2025. Zero inspections and zero reportable crashes in last 24 months (US and Canada). Carrier is classified as Private passenger carrier (not for-hire), aligns with business purpose of contracted transportation for special-needs students and developmentally disabled adults in MA and RI. Massachusetts incorporation date should be verified directly at corp.sec.state.ma.us (search interface is interactive and was not retrievable via deep-link); D&B/PrivCo indicate establishment 1998. Headquarters per PrivCo and address records are 8 Mill River St / 106 Grove St, Blackstone-Millville, MA 01504/01529 area; Woonsocket RI is the operations base.

name: Carrot Inc Which Will Do Bus

entity_status: Active — Foreign Stock Corporation in California (CA SOS entity C3775929); domicile Delaware; DBA 'Carrot Behavioral Health Inc.'
registry_source: California Secretary of State business entity C3775929 (via OpenCorporates); Crunchbase; SEC Form D filings
notes: NOT A BUS/TRANSPORTATION OPERATOR. 'Which Will Do Bus' = 'Which Will Do Business' truncated/OCR error from the standard California foreign-corporation alternate-name clause: '<EntityName>, which will do business in California as <AlternateName>'. Carrot, Inc. (Delaware) registered in CA on 2015-04-09 with alternate name 'Carrot Behavioral Health Inc.' — a digital health / behavioral change company providing mobile technology, coaching, and a breath sensor (Pivot product) for smoking cessation. ~$46.8M raised across 4 SEC Form D filings. Address 1600 Seaport Blvd Suite 150, Redwood City CA 94063 is the Seaport Centre office park, not a bus yard. No SAFER carrier record under 'CARROT'. RECOMMEND REMOVING FROM TUCK-IN TARGET LIST.
